data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh confirmed FAILS (exit 1) on current codebase. 3/4 tests fail (RED): test_generated_agents_contain_no_python_tool_names (33 matches), test_generated_agents_contain_configured_linter_language (10 files missing language), test_source_templates_contain_no_python_tool_names (6 matches). test_config_keys_preserved PASSES as expected.
